name: Construction Debris Removal
description: Complete post-construction debris hauling from data center build sites. We remove concrete waste, scrap metal, packaging materials, drywall, insulation, and general construction debris. Every load supervised by the owner.

faqs.question: What types of construction debris do you remove?
faqs.answer: We haul concrete waste, scrap metal, wood, drywall, insulation, packaging materials, cable spools, and general construction debris from data center sites.

faqs.question: Can you handle large-volume cleanups?
faqs.answer: Yes. We coordinate multi-trip removal schedules for large data center projects and work around your construction timeline.

faqs.question: Do you handle hazardous materials?
faqs.answer: We do not handle hazardous materials. We focus on standard construction debris and non-hazardous waste removal.

seo.title: Construction Debris Removal — Iowa City | Freight Bridge LLC
seo.description: Professional construction debris removal for data center projects in Iowa City. Concrete, scrap metal, packaging, and general waste hauled by an owner-operated team.

name: Decommissioned Equipment Hauling
description: Safe removal and transport of decommissioned data center equipment — old server racks, cooling units, UPS systems, cable trays, and obsolete infrastructure. Careful handling, owner-supervised loading.

faqs.question: What kind of equipment do you haul?
faqs.answer: Server racks, cooling units, UPS systems, PDUs, cable trays, raised floor tiles, and other decommissioned data center infrastructure.

faqs.question: Do you provide data destruction services?
faqs.answer: We focus on physical removal and transport. We can deliver equipment to your certified ITAD or e-waste recycling partner.

faqs.question: How do you handle heavy equipment?
faqs.answer: We coordinate with your on-site rigging team for loading. Mohamed personally supervises every equipment load to ensure safe transport.

seo.title: Decommissioned Equipment Hauling — Iowa City | Freight Bridge LLC
seo.description: Safe hauling of decommissioned data center equipment in Iowa City. Server racks, cooling units, UPS systems removed with owner supervision.

name: Post-Construction Site Cleanup
description: Final-phase site cleanup for data center construction projects. We clear remaining materials, haul leftover supplies, and leave the site ready for commissioning. Coordinated with your project timeline.

faqs.question: When do you come in for site cleanup?
faqs.answer: We come in during the final construction phase — after major buildout is complete but before commissioning. We work around your schedule.

faqs.question: Can you coordinate with the GC's timeline?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Mohamed works directly with site managers to schedule removal runs that don't disrupt active work zones.

seo.title: Post-Construction Site Cleanup — Iowa City | Freight Bridge LLC
seo.description: Post-construction site cleanup for data center builds in Iowa City. Final-phase material removal coordinated with your project timeline.
